title: Nadir into the Virtuous Board
summary: A replay-verified one-card Nadir Servant route that establishes Cartesia, Quem, Ecclesia, and The Fallen & The Virtuous.

C2.name: The Dragon that Devours the Dogma

cardNames: The Dragon that Devours the Dogma
prerequisites: The source replay uses the listed Extra Deck and Main Deck targets.
steps: Activate Nadir Servant; send The Dragon that Devours the Dogma from the Extra Deck to the GY and add Fallen of the White Dragon.
Activate Fallen of the White Dragon by sending Titaniklad the Ash Dragon from the Extra Deck to the GY, then Special Summon Fallen of the White Dragon.
Activate Fallen of the White Dragon to Special Summon Incredible Ecclesia, the Virtuous.
In the End Phase, activate Titaniklad the Ash Dragon to Special Summon Guiding Quem, the Virtuous.
Activate Guiding Quem, the Virtuous and send Blazing Cartesia, the Virtuous to the GY.
Activate The Dragon that Devours the Dogma in the GY and add The Fallen & The Virtuous.
Activate The Fallen & The Virtuous, sending Albion the Branded Dragon from the Extra Deck to the GY.
Send Fallen of the White Dragon and The Fallen & The Virtuous to the GY as the replay resolves.
Activate Guiding Quem, the Virtuous to Special Summon Blazing Cartesia, the Virtuous from the GY.
Activate Albion the Branded Dragon in the End Phase.
Set The Fallen & The Virtuous from the Deck.
notes: Curated from the recorded action order; redundant zone-change events are grouped into readable steps.
guide.endBoard: Blazing Cartesia, Guiding Quem, and Incredible Ecclesia with The Fallen & The Virtuous Set.

title: Black Chaos into Mind Shuffle
summary: A replay-verified Black Chaos route into Magician of Dark Chaos with Mind Shuffle established.

C5.name: Magician of Dark Chaos - Black Chaos

cardNames: Magician of Dark Chaos - Black Chaos
steps: Activate and discard Black Chaos to place Mind Shuffle.
Activate Mind Shuffle and add Skull Archfiend of Chaos.
Discard and activate Skull Archfiend of Chaos, sending Light and Darkness Ritual to the GY.
Add Magician of Dark Chaos - Black Chaos to the hand.
Activate Light and Darkness Ritual in the GY to recover Light and Darkness Ritual and Skull Archfiend of Chaos.
Activate Light and Darkness Ritual and banish Black Chaos from the GY.
Ritual Summon Magician of Dark Chaos - Black Chaos.
Light and Darkness Ritual resolves to the GY.
Activate Magician of Dark Chaos - Black Chaos and add Light and Darkness Ritual.
notes: The source replay contains 17 atomic actions; this snapshot groups costs and their resolving effects.
guide.endBoard: Magician of Dark Chaos - Black Chaos with Mind Shuffle established and Light and Darkness Ritual in hand.

title: Reco into Remix
summary: The one-card Reco route recorded with the Top 8 German Nationals Kewl Tune list.

prerequisites: The recorded list includes Fydraulis Harmonia and Zalen the Shackled Dragon.
steps: Normal Summon Kewl Tune Reco and activate it to add Kewl Tune Rotary.
Send Kewl Tune Rotary to the GY and Synchro Summon Kewl Tune Track Maker.
Activate Kewl Tune Rotary and Kewl Tune Track Maker to add Kewl Tune Cue and JJ "Kewl Tune".
Activate JJ "Kewl Tune".
Normal Summon Kewl Tune Cue and activate it to Special Summon Fydraulis Harmonia.
Activate JJ "Kewl Tune" and tribute Fydraulis Harmonia.
Special Summon Kewl Tune Mix and activate it to add Kewl Tune Reco.
Send Kewl Tune Cue to the GY and Synchro Summon Zalen the Shackled Dragon.
Activate Kewl Tune Cue in the GY.
Send Kewl Tune Reco to the GY and Synchro Summon Kewl Tune Remix.
Kewl Tune Remix completes the recorded board.
notes: The source replay contains 23 atomic actions; this snapshot groups costs and their resolving effects.
guide.endBoard: Kewl Tune Remix and Zalen the Shackled Dragon with the Kewl Tune engine loaded for follow-up.

title: Cue + Rotary Rosewhip Route
summary: A two-card Cue and Rotary route through Naturia Rosewhip, Track Maker, and Remix.

prerequisites: Naturia Rosewhip is the recorded Rotary target.
steps: Activate Kewl Tune Rotary.
Normal Summon Kewl Tune Cue and activate it to Special Summon Naturia Rosewhip.
Send Kewl Tune Rotary to the GY and Synchro Summon Kewl Tune Track Maker.
Resolve Kewl Tune Cue, Kewl Tune Rotary, and Kewl Tune Track Maker.
Add Kewl Tune Synchro and JJ "Kewl Tune" to the hand.
Activate JJ "Kewl Tune" and tribute Kewl Tune Track Maker.
Special Summon Kewl Tune Mix and activate it to add Kewl Tune Reco.
Normal Summon Kewl Tune Reco and activate it to add Kewl Tune Clip.
Send Kewl Tune Mix to the GY.
Synchro Summon Kewl Tune Remix.
Set Kewl Tune Synchro.
Keep Kewl Tune Clip available as follow-up.
Pass on Kewl Tune Remix with Kewl Tune Synchro Set.
notes: The source labels this line as missing Naturia Rosewhip from the attached tournament list; the route itself is replay-verified.
guide.endBoard: Kewl Tune Remix with Kewl Tune Synchro Set, plus Kewl Tune Clip follow-up.

title: Terminus into Power Patron Board
summary: The recorded one-card Terminus route through the Power Patron engine into Varudras, Regulus, Sargas, and DoomZ interaction.

C3.name: Vidolium the Unstable Power Patron of Unity

C19.name: Jupiter the Power Patron of Destruction

C20.name: Varudras, the Final Bringer of the End Times

cardNames: Vidolium the Unstable Power Patron of Unity
Jupiter the Power Patron of Destruction
Varudras, the Final Bringer of the End Times
prerequisites: The recorded build includes Clockwork Knight and the Sargas/Regulus package.
steps: Activate Prohibited Power Patron Portal - Terminus; send Jupredo the Shademachine Power Patron and add Vidolium the Unstable Power Patron of Unity.
Activate Vidolium the Unstable Power Patron of Unity to Special Summon Jupredo the Shademachine Power Patron and add Power Patron DoomZ.
Use the Power Patron sequence to Special Summon Clockwork Knight and add DoomZ Raiders.
Activate DoomZ Raiders, send Power Patron DoomZ, and Special Summon DoomZ VII Seven - Elara.
Resolve Elara to Set DoomZ Change and add DoomZ V Five - Amalthe.
Normal Summon DoomZ V Five - Amalthe and add DoomZ XII Zero - Drastea.
Xyz Summon Springans Merrymaker, then Xyz Summon Gigantic "Champion" Sargas and add Therion "King" Regulus.
Special Summon Therion "King" Regulus and equip Power Patron DoomZ.
Special Summon DoomZ XII Zero - Drastea and place DoomZ Command "D.O.O.M.D.U.R.G.".
Activate DoomZ Change and Drastea to load DoomZ Destruction and Jupredo the Shademachine Power Patron.
Xyz Summon DoomZ XII End - Drastrius, then Xyz Summon DoomZ XIII Over - Graflareio.
Activate DoomZ XIII Over - Graflareio and add DoomZ Command "A.D.R.A.S.T.E.I.A.".
Activate DoomZ Command "A.D.R.A.S.T.E.I.A." and resolve the DoomZ destruction chain.
Special Summon Power Patron DoomZ, then Special Summon Jupredo the Shademachine Power Patron.
Use the Patron engine to Special Summon Jupiter the Power Patron of Destruction.
Equip DoomZ Command "A.D.R.A.S.T.E.I.A." and DoomZ Command "D.O.O.M.D.U.R.G." to Jupiter the Power Patron of Destruction.
Re-establish DoomZ XII Zero - Drastea and Jupredo the Shademachine Power Patron through the recorded Patron loop.
Activate Gigantic "Champion" Sargas to recover DoomZ Command "D.O.O.M.D.U.R.G.".
Tribute Jupiter the Power Patron of Destruction and Xyz Summon Varudras, the Final Bringer of the End Times.
Set DoomZ Destruction and keep Therion "King" Regulus, Gigantic "Champion" Sargas, Drastea, Clockwork Knight, and Varudras on the board.
notes: The 89 recorded atomic actions are grouped into engine checkpoints; follow the source for individual detach/equip chain links.
guide.endBoard: Varudras, Drastea, Sargas, Regulus, and Clockwork Knight with DoomZ Destruction and DoomZ Command interaction.

title: Change + Fuwalos Power Patron
summary: A recorded two-card DoomZ Change route that converts Fuwalos into the Power Patron and Sargas package.

C17.name: Vidolium the Unstable Power Patron of Unity

C19.name: Varudras, the Final Bringer of the End Times

cardNames: Vidolium the Unstable Power Patron of Unity
Varudras, the Final Bringer of the End Times
prerequisites: Mulcharmy Fuwalos is available to become material after serving as interaction.
steps: Activate DoomZ Change and destroy Power Patron DoomZ from the Deck.
Activate Power Patron DoomZ and add DoomZ VII Seven - Elara.
Normal Summon DoomZ VII Seven - Elara and Set DoomZ Command "A.D.R.A.S.T.E.I.A.".
Use Elara to Xyz Summon DoomZ Break - Diactorus, then Xyz Summon DoomZ XIII Over - Graflareio.
Activate DoomZ XIII Over - Graflareio and add DoomZ Raiders.
Activate DoomZ Raiders, clearing the DoomZ cards used so far and Special Summoning DoomZ V Five - Amalthe.
Resolve Amalthe and Graflareio to Special Summon Jupredo the Shademachine Power Patron and add DoomZ XII Zero - Drastea.
Use DoomZ Command "A.D.R.A.S.T.E.I.A." to recycle the Patron and revive DoomZ VII Seven - Elara.
Activate Jupredo the Shademachine Power Patron and add Prohibited Power Patron Portal - Terminus.
Xyz Summon Springans Merrymaker, then Xyz Summon Gigantic "Champion" Sargas.
Activate Gigantic "Champion" Sargas and add Therion "King" Regulus.
Special Summon Therion "King" Regulus and equip DoomZ Break - Diactorus.
Special Summon DoomZ XII Zero - Drastea and place DoomZ Command "D.O.O.M.D.U.R.G.".
Activate Prohibited Power Patron Portal - Terminus, send Jupredo the Shademachine Power Patron, and add Vidolium the Unstable Power Patron of Unity.
Use Vidolium the Unstable Power Patron of Unity to Special Summon Jupredo and add Plundered Power Patron Plane - Vidolia.
Activate Plundered Power Patron Plane - Vidolia, banish Mulcharmy Fuwalos, Special Summon Jupredo, and Xyz Summon Varudras, the Final Bringer of the End Times.
notes: This is a checkpoint transcription of the recorded line; the source retains every equip, detach, and chain-link action.
guide.endBoard: Varudras, Drastea, Sargas, and Regulus backed by DoomZ Command interaction.

title: Habakiri into Azamina Mitsurugi
summary: The recorded one-card Habakiri route into Futsu, Azamina Ilia Silvia, Dyna Mondo, I:P, and Prayers.

C14.name: Selene, Queen of the Master Magicians

cardNames: Selene, Queen of the Master Magicians
prerequisites: The recorded build uses the Dark Magician, Selene, and Azamina bridge packages.
steps: Activate Ame no Habakiri no Mitsurugi to Special Summon and tribute Mitsurugi no Mikoto, Saji, then add Mitsurugi Ritual.
Activate Mitsurugi Ritual, tribute Mitsurugi no Mikoto, Kusanagi and Mitsurugi no Mikoto, Aramasa, and Ritual Summon Ame no Habakiri no Mitsurugi.
Resolve Kusanagi and Aramasa to add Futsu no Mitama no Mitsurugi and recover Mitsurugi Ritual.
Activate Mitsurugi Ritual, tribute Futsu no Mitama no Mitsurugi, and Ritual Summon Ame no Murakumo no Mitsurugi.
Add Mitsurugi Mirror, then use it to tribute Ame no Habakiri no Mitsurugi and Ritual Summon Futsu no Mitama no Mitsurugi.
Add Mitsurugi Prayers, use it to tribute Ame no Murakumo no Mitsurugi, and continue the Mitsurugi revival chain.
Normal Summon Mitsurugi no Mikoto, Aramasa and Xyz Summon Gallant Granite.
Activate Gallant Granite to add the bridge target, then Link Summon Reprodocus.
Use the recorded type-changing bridge to Special Summon Dark Magician of Destruction and add Magicians' Souls.
Link Summon Selene, Queen of the Master Magicians and use Magicians' Souls to load Diabellstar the Black Witch.
Activate Selene, Queen of the Master Magicians to Special Summon Diabellstar the Black Witch and Set Deception of the Sinful Spoils.
Link Summon Charmer Quartet in Bloom and use it to Special Summon Futsu no Mitama no Mitsurugi.
Activate Deception of the Sinful Spoils, tribute Charmer Quartet in Bloom, and add The Hallowed Azamina.
Activate The Hallowed Azamina to Fusion Summon Azamina Mu Rcielago.
Activate Azamina Mu Rcielago and add WANTED: Seeker of Sinful Spoils.
Link Summon I:P Masquerena using the recorded materials.
Recycle Azamina Mu Rcielago with The Hallowed Azamina, then activate WANTED: Seeker of Sinful Spoils.
Fusion Summon Azamina Ilia Silvia and resolve WANTED: Seeker of Sinful Spoils for follow-up.
Link Summon Dyna Mondo with Diabellstar the Black Witch as the route closes.
Set Mitsurugi Prayers.
notes: The source replay has 93 atomic actions; this guide preserves its engine checkpoints and named bridge pieces.
guide.endBoard: Futsu no Mitama no Mitsurugi, Azamina Ilia Silvia, Dyna Mondo, I:P Masquerena, and Mitsurugi Prayers.

title: Lukias + Ketu into Spheres and Gulamel
summary: An official feature-match line through Arthalion, Hieratic Seal, Rahu, and Gulamel.

C10.name: Hieratic Seal of the Heavenly Spheres

cardNames: Hieratic Seal of the Heavenly Spheres
prerequisites: The feature-match hand also contained Branded Fusion and Ash Blossom; neither was required for this opening sequence.
steps: Normal Summon Dracotail Lukias and add Dracotail Faimena.
Activate Ketu Dracotail and add Dracotail Pan.
Activate Dracotail Faimena, fusing Dracotail Pan with Dracotail Urgula to Fusion Summon Dracotail Arthalion.
Resolve Dracotail Urgula and Dracotail Pan to Set Rahu Dracotail and Dracotail Flame.
Activate Dracotail Arthalion to return Dracotail Pan and Dracotail Faimena to the hand.
Link Summon Spirit with Eyes of Blue using Dracotail Lukias.
Link Summon Hieratic Seal of the Heavenly Spheres using Spirit with Eyes of Blue and Dracotail Arthalion.
Activate Rahu Dracotail.
Fuse Dracotail Faimena from the hand with Dracotail Mululu from the Deck.
Fusion Summon Dracotail Gulamel.
Pass with Hieratic Seal of the Heavenly Spheres, Dracotail Gulamel, and Dracotail Flame.
notes: This line is transcribed from Duel 1 of official event coverage.
guide.endBoard: Hieratic Seal of the Heavenly Spheres, Dracotail Gulamel, and Dracotail Flame.
